name: Sarashina2-70B
note: MIT-licensed Japanese base model trained ground-up on ~2.1T tokens of Japanese, English, and code; not instruction-tuned.
tpsNote: 70B does not fit in a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM at Q4 (~40GB needed); no verified single-GPU measurement found.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real model. HF config.json (fetched) shows LlamaForCausalLM architecture, max_position_embeddings=8192 (=ctxK 8), hidden_size 8192, 80 layers — consistent with a 70B-class dense Llama-style model. HF commit history (fetched) shows the initial commit was made 2024-08-06, exactly matching the claimed releaseDate (a separate SB Intuitions tech-blog post about the model was dated 2024-08-21, but the HF repo's own commit history is the more precise/primary source and is used here). MIT license and 'not instruction-tuned' base-model status confirmed via search of SB Intuitions' own materials. 2.1T token / Japanese-English-code training mix confirmed via search results describing the Sarashina2 series (Japanese:English:Code ratio 5:4:1, ~2.1T tokens total). No results rows were present to check. No changes needed.
